programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve and the crew continue their search for the planet's deadliest predators with a visit to Florida in the USA. Steve wades into a swamp to try and catch a slippery amphibian called the amphiuma and tracks down America's largest snake, the eastern diamondback rattlesnake. His journey ends in the Florida Keys where he witnesses firsthand the sophisticated hunting methods of highly intelligent bottlenose dolphins.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: In this special episode Steve Backshall reveals the advanced camera technology and tricks of the trade that allow him and the Deadly 60 crew to film stunning images of the planet's most lethal predators. Including the high-speed camera that captured the breathtaking breach attack of the great white shark and the specially designed camera traps that let the crew film wildlife when they're not even there.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Motoring news and views with Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May. Jeremy and Richard settle the thorny issue of which company has, above all others, made the greatest number of truly brilliant cars. James has a novel solution for getting caravans to campsites without clogging up the roads, and Jeremy hits the track in a remarkable replica of a legendary rally car. Plus Radio 2's Breakfast Show DJ and all round petrolhead Chris Evans is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: The Apprentice
programme.desc: It's week 11, and the final five candidates must face a gruelling round of interviews with some of Lord Sugar’s toughest-talking business associates. As their business plans are picked apart, some candidates hold their own, while others crumble under the pressure. In the boardroom, Lord Sugar has a tough decision to make, as only two can make it through to next week’s grand final.

programme.title: Ashley Cain: Into the Danger Zone
programme.desc: Brazil’s favelas are considered extremely dangerous, making them one of the world’s most deadly places to grow up. As a result of poverty and a lack of government and police control, many young men here resort to drug dealing and gang crime under the control of the drug cartels. In other neighbourhoods, heavily armed criminal militia groups control day-to-day life with an iron grip, extorting residents – fail to pay or cross them, and the consequences can be deadly. Ashley meets young men living in some of Rio’s most notorious favelas to find out what it’s like to live here and what forces them to join gangs to survive. He will learn what it takes to become a lookout, foot soldier and drug dealer in a world where death could become a reality at any moment. And he’ll come face to face with a gun-toting militia boss to uncover how these men rule the favelas through fear and intimidation.

programme.title: Ashley Cain: Into the Danger Zone
programme.desc: South Africa has for years battled the scourge of rhino poaching, fuelled by insatiable demand for their horns in Asia. Ashley embarks on a mission to find out who is behind these brutal acts, discovering how the challenges young men face growing up in deprived rural communities can lead to illegal poaching. Hanging out with men from KwaZulu-Natal – or Zululand – he earns their trust and joins them on a legal hunt for bushmeat in order to understand what day-to-day life is like here. He immerses himself in all sides of the issue - meeting an illegal poacher who is horrifyingly responsible for over 150 rhino deaths and a family whose son was killed while attempting to hunt a rhino. He even joins antipoaching units to see the measures being used to protect these incredible creatures.

programme.title: Ashley Cain: Into the Danger Zone
programme.desc: Marseille has been France’s drug capital for over 50 years, but the violence of the city's drug war is escalating as rival gangs kidnap, torture, kill and even set one another on fire. Ashley spends time in the notorious northern suburbs known as the 'cités', meeting young men involved in fighting the bloody drug war. He also rides along with the police on a night-time patrol. To understand the present, Ashley needs to learn of Marseille’s past, so he meets a former gangster who was part of the city’s infamous French Connection drugs trade in the 1970s and 80s. Ashley also meets people trying to steer young men away from gang life, video calls a gang boss behind bars and meets a small-time dealer who became a deadly hitman.

programme.title: Babies
programme.desc: Flashbacks show Stephen and Lisa’s first meeting, while Amanda’s pregnancy and Dave’s ambitions create uncertainty for all.

programme.title: Babies
programme.desc: At a friend’s wedding, Lisa struggles in the face of Amanda’s pregnancy, and Stephen tries to find the courage to confront Dave.

programme.title: This is BBC Two
programme.desc: Highlights of programmes on BBC Two.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles is in the driving seat in this special episode all about motoring memorabilia. In Oswestry, one team comes to an abrupt halt when they spot a vintage stop-go road sign. And in Exeter, another duo drives down the price of a luxury car mascot – with a magic trick! But which will cruise to the biggest profit at auction? Meanwhile, Eric journeys along the Time Road exhibition at the British Motor Museum to witness milestones in British motoring history. In the Cotswolds, Christina Trevanion goes for a spin at one of Britain’s most historic racing circuits. And in Solihull, Danny Sebastian is in his element as he sits astride some of the oldest, rarest and most valuable motorcycles in the world.

programme.title: Secret Garden
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals the lives of kingfishers, otters and other animals whose home is a river garden. Life here seems idyllic, but all are at the mercy of seasonal floods.

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gabby Logan presents highlights from Sunday’s four Premier League games, including title contenders Manchester City against Chelsea. Elsewhere, Roberto De Zerbi takes charge of relegation-threatened Spurs for the first time against Sunderland, Nottingham Forest face Aston Villa, and Newcastle travel to Crystal Palace.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: Politics Live
programme.desc: The big political issues of the day.

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Game show in which 24 players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day. In each episode there are three rounds, and the three highest scorers from each round play against each other in the final. The winner of this battle faces a £10,000 question.

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: In the ultimate knockout quiz, eight players do battle on the Tournament Run in a series of exciting tug-of-war quiz matches as they attempt to knock their opponents out of the game and steal their cash. Only one player will be left standing at the end, but can they make it all the way to the Golden Run to double their money? Hosted by Alex Scott.

programme.title: Lightning
programme.desc: Comedian Zoe Lyons presents the electrifyingly fast quiz with a £3,000 jackpot. Six plucky contestants compete across six rounds testing their general knowledge, quick thinking and speedy reactions whilst our ruthless spotlight patrols the studio. The contestants’ motivation in each round is simple: stay out of the light and you’ll be alright!

programme.title: Clive Myrie’s Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: In Jamaica’s capital city, Clive learns he has hidden talents when it comes to trying out some dancehall moves. He explores a 19th-century mansion which tells the story of Jamaica’s first black millionaire and heads to the school that has produced most of the country’s Olympic sprinting talent. Clive also makes time to head for the hills to sample a special Jamaican-Irish stout punch as he learns of the long connection between these two islands.

programme.title: Nature's Epic Journeys
programme.desc: A hundred thousand caribou face starving bears and wolves, deadly frozen rivers and rugged mountains as they undertake the world's longest land migration - 5,000 kilometres through the frozen Arctic wilderness of Canada and Alaska. Liz Bonnin leads a team of scientists and film-makers using cutting-edge technology to follow the herd, providing insights into the individual lives of the animals. The caribou must reach their calving grounds before they give birth - failure would spell disaster.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A Steiff teddy bear bought 'for the dog to play with', a huge Chinese paper passport which saved a family's life in 1926, and a drug jar which Oliver Cromwell might have seen are among the items brought to the experts in Hartlepool. Plus, Michael Aspel is shown a piece of shrapnel which killed the owner's grandfather in the bombardment of Hartlepool in 1914.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Flog it! comes from Chiddingstone Castle in Kent. Antiques experts Thomas Plant and Adam Partridge find some fascinating antiques and collectibles to take to auction. Paul Martin visits Chartwell House, home of Sir Winston Churchill, to uncover the real man behind the politician.

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Every day this week, celebrity contestants Jacqui Joseph, Ben Thompson, Laura Tobin and Henning Wehn take on a series of quiz rounds selected by the host, quiz legend Richard Osman. A daily winner is declared following a quickfire round at the end of each show, and the scores are tallied across the week, resulting in an overall champion being crowned on Friday. Will the winning stars opt for the much-coveted House of Games decanter, or will they be tempted by the House of Games retro bag?

programme.title: Great Japanese Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael begins his journey in Japan’s dynamic second city, Osaka, famous for its food culture, its nightlife and its friendly people. Using the city’s metro system, he heads for the bustling Shinsekai neighbourhood to taste the city’s signature dish - fried octopus balls. Michael explores the artistic and cultural phenomenon of manga, the Japanese comics that have taken the world by storm, pays homage to the godfather of manga, Osamu Tezuka, and becomes the subject of his own railway manga. Michael’s next journey is on one of Japan’s world-famous bullet trains, the Shinkansen. He meets an engineer, ex-Shinkansen driver and now Japan Rail executive to find out about the bullet train’s amazing history and is blown away by the extraordinary next generation of trains, the maglev. Finally, Michael arrives in Nagoya, Japan’s manufacturing hub, and outside the city is a factory that makes one of the country’s most talked about exports - the smart loo.

programme.title: Global Eye
programme.desc: A weekly programme from the BBC World Service, bringing forensic journalism from all corners of the world by BBC Eye, the World Service's critically acclaimed investigative unit, and featuring expert global correspondents getting to the heart of the biggest international stories. This week, Farhat Javed looks at how Pakistan has positioned itself as a peace broker in the conflict between the US and Iran and BBC Eye investigates how routine visits for medical treatment in rural Pakistan have led to hundreds of children becoming infected with HIV, uncovering evidence of medical negligence and a failing public health system.

programme.title: Extraordinary Portraits
programme.desc: Bill Bailey matches wildlife sanctuary owner Lindsay with celebrity artist and animal lover Ricky Wilson. But Ricky faces an artistic dilemma.

programme.title: Mastermind
programme.desc: Clive Myrie presents the last semi-final of the classic quiz where contenders return to the black chair under the glare of the spotlight and the ticking clock to win the remaining place in the grand final. The specialist subjects are Amelia Earhart, Sir Laurence Olivier, the red wines of Burgundy and the songs of Sir Noël Coward.

programme.title: University Challenge
programme.desc: The second set of semi-finalists face off for a place in the final. Amol Rajan asks the questions.

programme.title: Miriam Margolyes Made Me Me
programme.desc: Director Simon Draper sets out to make a podcast with actress Miriam Margolyes, but the project soon becomes sidetracked as Simon is drawn ever deeper into her orbit. The podcast becomes a chaotic, joyful road trip, revealing Miriam’s true legacy isn’t just her work but the lives she’s quietly transformed, beginning with Simon.

programme.title: Disclosure
programme.desc: A single mum from Scotland's east coast embarks on a whirlwind romance with a Ghanaian preacher. They quickly marry, and she takes his side as the first lady of his church. But lives are torn apart when tragedy strikes. Reporter Myles Bonnar meets friends and family to try to find out what happened to Charmain.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Insights and global interviews on the news stories of the day. With Victoria Derbyshire.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: An American Tragedy
programme.desc: With unique access to friends and family, including Jackson’s sister La Toya, this episode charts Michael Jackson’s journey from child performer to a deeply troubled musical icon. Behind The Jackson 5, the family act that launched Michael to fame, was a household described by insiders as driven by fear as much as by talent. An offer of a film role helps Michael gain independence from his controlling father, causing tensions and resentments within the family. This leads to Michael's search for authentic connections elsewhere, including among the Jehovah's Witnesses. In 1982, Michael releases his masterpiece Thriller, catapulting him to megastardom and turning him into a global business empire. But the pressures of fame begin to weigh heavily, and colleagues also describe a pattern in Michael’s behaviour: a preference for the company of children.

programme.title: The Misadventures of Romesh Ranganathan
programme.desc: Romesh Ranganathan explores Uganda, its people and culture, its past and its modern complexity, to find out whether Brits should add this this visually stunning, landlocked country the size of the UK to their holiday bucket list. With his guide, Bugandan princess Alex, Romesh learns about Uganda’s history before and after Idi Amin and how Uganda got its name, before sampling traditional rural village life by getting blind drunk on banana gin (of unknown alcohol strength). Rom is awed by Uganda’s natural beauty but is unable to ignore an ugly truth. Will the treatment of the LGBTQ+ community in Uganda in the wake of the widely supported and recently passed anti-gay laws force him to come to an uncomfortable conclusion about his time in the country?

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Matt Baker and Margherita Taylor visit Bisterne Estate in Hampshire’s Avon Valley, where farmland and water meadows provide a vital home for two classic signs of spring – the lapwing and the hare. They meet the farmers and conservationists working together to restore habitats for both species, while Matt records the sounds of spring with a local sound artist and joins volunteers caring for the historic Harnham Water Meadows. Author Robert Macfarlane shares an exclusive spring reading, and on his Cotswolds farm, Adam Henson restores a traditional hedgerow, just in time for nesting birds.

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out
programme.desc: Stacey and the team head to Twickenham to help the Allan family tackle their overflowing home.

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: Ian Fletcher starts a new chapter in Miami as director of integrity for the Fifa World Cup, overseeing the biggest football event in the world. His first challenge is to lead the oversight team towards a decision on which cities should host the semi-final matches. It’s hard enough to get the team to agree, and the fact that it’s also Miami Day on the day of the announcement, and that no-one knows what that is, only serves to complicate things. Meanwhile, the social media team work on a new sustainability initiative based around human waste. The 'power of poop' may just be the solution everyone needs.

programme.title: This is BBC Two
programme.desc: Highlights of programmes on BBC Two.

programme.title: Shift the Thrift
programme.desc: In Hastings, partners James and Elaine scour 15 charity shops, hunting for vintage gems and a hidden star buy before facing a tense, live online auction for charity.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: The man who built a cinema at the bottom of his garden – it sounds like a Hollywood plot, but it’s true! Bus driver Andy Jones spent five years and more than £70,000 building the 30-seat movie theatre in Stoke-on-Trent. Andy began salvaging items from old cinemas when he was a boy, and today he hosts charity movie nights for his local community. Is there a Hollywood-style ending for either team in this episode? It’s sisters versus sisters at an antiques centre in Derbyshire. Karen and Claire are in red, while Sharon and Margaret are in blue. With expert Nick Hall by their side, the blues reflect on a fancy French mirror until Nick notices how modern it is. Meanwhile, the reds and Izzie Balmer ease themselves into their shop with a Glastonbury chair – but the price isn’t music to their ears. In Derby, auctioneer James Lewis sells the teams’ items, but what will the bidders make of them?

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: In Rotherham, 25-year-old sports fanatic Kerry dreams of becoming a Paralympian after a skiing accident changed her life. Roman Kemp wants to introduce her to an unlikely ally: the humble beetroot. Studies show that beetroot can boost fitness performance and enhance brain power. It is a vibrant vegetable with serious athletic potential.

programme.title: Farm 999
programme.desc: In Bedfordshire, a scorching summer’s day turns to chaos when flames rip through the countryside. Farmers and firefighters join forces in a desperate battle to contain a fast-moving field fire threatening homes and livelihoods. With dramatic footage filmed by farmer and YouTuber George Saunders, we hear first-hand from those who faced the blaze – including the crews who risked everything to stop it from spreading. In Leicestershire, a beloved horse is in danger after plunging into a freezing swimming pool. As panic rises, a specialist fire and rescue team race to save it, with the help of a local farmer, before it’s too late. Meanwhile, reporter Paul Colgan is in Northern Ireland to meet volunteers behind Operation Brockwatch – a groundbreaking scheme using hidden cameras to protect badgers from ruthless illegal hunters.

programme.title: Lost and Found in the Lakes
programme.desc: Freedivers are called into action when they learn of a houseboat fire that happened 17 years ago on Windermere. Can they find the wreckage and rescue a treasured possession? Crafter Sally takes on a vintage teacup fished out of the water and gives it a surprising new lease of life. And social media detective Mui finds a hidden clue in a drone full of memories. Can she track down its owner?

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: Politics Live
programme.desc: The big political issues of the day.

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Game show in which 24 players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day. In each episode there are three rounds, and the three highest scorers from each round play against each other in the final. The winner of this battle faces a £10,000 question.

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: In the ultimate knockout quiz, eight players do battle on the Tournament Run in a series of exciting tug-of-war quiz matches as they attempt to knock their opponents out of the game and steal their cash. Only one player will be left standing at the end, but can they make it all the way to the Golden Run to double their money? Hosted by Alex Scott.

programme.title: Lightning
programme.desc: Comedian Zoe Lyons presents the electrifyingly fast quiz with a £3,000 jackpot. Six plucky contestants compete across six rounds testing their general knowledge, quick thinking and speedy reactions whilst our ruthless spotlight patrols the studio. The contestants’ motivation in each round is simple: stay out of the light and you’ll be alright!

programme.title: Clive Myrie’s Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: The Coronation Market is the largest street market in all of Jamaica, and it’s nestled in Downtown Kingston. It’s where Clive brushes up on his Jamaican patois and tries out some of the best street food on the island. He also catches up with a mural art collective who have been transforming this district before checking out a trendy boutique to get kitted out with some brand new Downtown threads, hoping to look the part for a night out at the hottest reggae club in town.

programme.title: Nature's Epic Journeys
programme.desc: Thousands of zebra face lions, hunting dogs, drought and starvation as they undertake the world's most recently discovered migration. Braving one of Botswana's most brutal wildernesses, they make Africa's longest land migration to reach the rich grasslands of Nxai Pan National Park. Liz Bonnin leads a team of scientists and film-makers using cutting-edge technology to attempt something that has never been done before - following the zebra on the ground, every step of the way, to reveal the secrets behind this brand new discovery.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts gather in the parade ring at Newmarket racecourse and not surprisingly find many items with an equine theme: a bronze of the Classic winner Ibrahim with a 'wonky ear', a loving cup with 'Steeplechase' inscribed on it and a pearlware horse with a Yorkshire pedigree. An ointment pot found in a fireplace, and framed ivory pictures of India bought from the dustman for 7 pounds, turn out to be bargains. And a striking portrait of an Indian prince could be worth a king's ransom if only the artist could be identified.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Presenter Paul Martin is joined by antiques experts Adam Partridge and James Lewis in the North Yorkshire town of Richmond. A gold pocket watch catches James's eye, while Adam takes a look at a collection of pipes that were destined for the skip. Paul explores the fascinating process of how Wallace and Gromit's favourite cheese, Wensleydale, is made.

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Every day this week, celebrity contestants Jacqui Joseph, Ben Thompson, Laura Tobin and Henning Wehn take on a series of quiz rounds selected by the host, quiz legend Richard Osman. A daily winner is declared following a quickfire round at the end of each show, and the scores are tallied across the week, resulting in an overall champion being crowned on Friday. Will the winning stars opt for the much-coveted House of Games decanter, or will they be tempted by the House of Games retro bag?

programme.title: Great Japanese Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael travels to the cultural heart of Japan, Kyoto, the city that for a thousand years was the capital. At the Rozanji temple, he learns about a book that is described as the world’s first novel, the Tale of Genji. Across the city, Michael visits the last remaining wagasa umbrella workshop in Kyoto. At Kyoto’s Matsunoo shrine, Michael gets a beginner’s guide to shrine etiquette and discovers the countless daily Shinto rituals that have become part of Japanese life. The day ends with Michael taking a trip to a local restaurant to meet Satoha, an apprentice geisha, to find out how this ancient artform is adapting to modern life.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Four chefs compete for south west England with blockbuster canapes, starters and fish dishes celebrating the British film industry. The dishes are judged by this week's veteran judge, Michelin-starred chef Simon Rogan, and include a potato peel pie that pays homage to the film The Guernsey Literary and Potato Peel Pie Society, as well as a dish including foraged ingredients from the pathway to Cornwall’s Minack Theatre, which features in the film Fisherman’s Friends. Who will impress, and who will be sent home?

programme.title: Britain's Biggest Warship
programme.desc: The next phase of flight testing for the top-secret F35 jets is under way. Coping with a rolling, pitching, wind-blown deck is hard enough, but a full-blown hurricane is looming.

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Rhod Gilbert, Ignacio Lopez and Zoe Lyons join Sandi Toksvig and Alan Davies as QI goes viral.

programme.title: To Think Like a Killer
programme.desc: When the FBI calls, Dr Ann Burgess joins a new task force hunting serial predators and is thrust into an active investigation involving the assault of over 20 women.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Insights and global interviews on the news stories of the day. With Victoria Derbyshire.

programme.title: The Haunting
programme.desc: Infamous in the annals of the haunted, Hill House has attracted a group of four investigators, who spend the night to uncover the terrifying truth. Something prowls the panelled corridors and climbs the creaking walls. Something from beyond the grave, which walks Hill House alone...

programme.title: The Apprentice
programme.desc: It's week 11, and the final five candidates must face a gruelling round of interviews with some of Lord Sugar’s toughest-talking business associates. As their business plans are picked apart, some candidates hold their own, while others crumble under the pressure. In the boardroom, Lord Sugar has a tough decision to make, as only two can make it through to next week’s grand final.

programme.title: The Apprentice: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Angela and her special guests take a deep dive into the candidates’ performances and analyse the task, the boardroom and the firing. Plus, she has an exclusive chat with the next person to leave the process. This week's guests are Ricky Martin and Harriet Rose. Find out more on the website bbc.co.uk/apprentice or by using #TheApprentice

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: The lads decide it’s time to expand their empire in Cork city. Their days of doing all the hard work are over – they plan on being the bosses now.

programme.title: Race Across the World
programme.desc: Leaving the tranquillity of Kefalonia behind, the teams race through Greece to reach one of Europe’s biggest and most vibrant cities, Istanbul, where Europe and Asia collide.

programme.title: This is BBC Two
programme.desc: Highlights of programmes on BBC Two.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin comes across a layout he’s never seen before, which is rare given his 20-plus years on the show! Dion encounters all weathers in Manchester and Leeds.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: It’s all go in rural Oxfordshire as Richie Anderson helps a couple branch out and leave the suburbs to fulfil their dream of creating a forest school. With an impressive budget, the stunning property line-up is full of leafy promise, including a beautiful, converted mill house that’s anything but run-of-the-mill. Richie also meets an innovative young artist who creates her masterpieces on a bicycle-powered sewing machine... artistry on a ‘wheelie’ different level!

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Four chefs compete for south west England with blockbuster canapes, starters and fish dishes celebrating the British film industry. The dishes are judged by this week's veteran judge, Michelin-starred chef Simon Rogan, and include a potato peel pie that pays homage to the film The Guernsey Literary and Potato Peel Pie Society, as well as a dish including foraged ingredients from the pathway to Cornwall’s Minack Theatre, which features in the film Fisherman’s Friends. Who will impress, and who will be sent home?

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: Politics Live
programme.desc: The big political issues of the day.

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Game show in which 24 players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day. In each episode there are three rounds, and the three highest scorers from each round play against each other in the final. The winner of this battle faces a £10,000 question.

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: In the ultimate knockout quiz, eight players do battle on the Tournament Run in a series of exciting tug-of-war quiz matches as they attempt to knock their opponents out of the game and steal their cash. Only one player will be left standing at the end, but can they make it all the way to the Golden Run to double their money? Hosted by Alex Scott.

programme.title: Lightning
programme.desc: Comedian Zoe Lyons presents the electrifyingly fast quiz with a £3,000 jackpot. Six plucky contestants compete across six rounds testing their general knowledge, quick thinking and speedy reactions whilst our ruthless spotlight patrols the studio. The contestants’ motivation in each round is simple: stay out of the light and you’ll be alright!

programme.title: Clive Myrie’s Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: Clive travels north to the Goldeneye estate, which was once the home of James Bond writer Ian Fleming. This is the creative birthplace of 007, and all 14 of the Bond books were written here. Clive props up the bar at Fleming’s favourite watering hole and enjoys a martini, dives into the water with a group of former fishermen who are saving the island’s coral reef, samples some mouth-watering Rastafarian ‘Ital’ cuisine, and visits a legalised cannabis farm.

programme.title: Ancient Invisible Cities
programme.desc: Dr Michael Scott uses the latest 3D scanning technology to reveal the historical secrets of Cairo and ancient Egypt. He explores the first pyramid ever built at Saqqara and finds out how it helped inspire the Great Pyramid of Giza. The 3D scans confirm just how accurately the Great Pyramid was designed and constructed. Michael also investigates the Sphinx to try to determine which pharaoh it represents. But the history of Cairo is not only about the ancient Egyptians. Michael goes in search of a Roman fortress hidden under a Greek Orthodox church. He also attempts to descend a 90-metre well carved into solid bedrock beneath the Arabic citadel built by Saladin in the 12th century AD. This remarkable well was built by Crusader prisoners of war and provided the citadel with water in times of siege. Along the way, Michael discovers that the ancient Egyptians had built their capital, Memphis, close to where Cairo now stands on the banks of the river Nile. This evolved into a Roman fortress called Babylon. And finally, the Arabs founded a city called Cairo. Today, it's the largest city in Africa.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and a team of experts invite members of the public to bring along their antiques for examination. Fascinating finds include several plates from the Nant Gawr and Swansea potteries, a Victorian Welsh hat, a high-quality, bow-fronted barometer and a valuable whale's tooth.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Barrow Hill Railway Heritage Centre in Derbyshire is the venue for today’s Flog It! As usual, hundreds of visitors arrive with their family heirlooms and our experts find some unusual items to try out at auction. Paul Martin visits Haversage and finds out about its connection with Charlotte Bronte’s book Jane Eyre.

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Every day this week, celebrity contestants Jacqui Joseph, Ben Thompson, Laura Tobin and Henning Wehn take on a series of quiz rounds selected by the host, quiz legend Richard Osman. A daily winner is declared following a quickfire round at the end of each show, and the scores are tallied across the week, resulting in an overall champion being crowned on Friday. Will the winning stars opt for the much-coveted House of Games decanter, or will they be tempted by the House of Games retro bag?

programme.title: Great Japanese Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael takes a luxury, panoramic Shimikaze train to the beautiful Shima Peninsula. It transports visitors to Ise Jingu, Japan’s most sacred Shinto shrine, and is also renowned for its stunning coastline. Michael takes a trip to Ago Bay, where over 60 small islands sit just off the coast in the shimmering Pacific Ocean. The next stop is Nara, the ancient capital of Japan, a beautiful, tranquil city where some 1,400 sika deer roam the green open spaces. Michael visits the magnificent Buddhist Todaiji temple and is astonished to find one of the largest bronze Buddha statues in the world, towering at a height of 15 metres. Michael’s last stop in Nara is at a traditional sumi stick workshop. Made from soot, gelatine and perfume, these blocks of ink are used for Japanese calligraphy.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The three talented chefs from south west England are halfway through their heat, and the pressure is mounting. Once again, they each serve a unique take on the brief celebrating the British film industry and films with links to their region. The dishes are judged by veteran judge Simon Rogan. They include a guinea fowl dish designed to bring Aardman character Feathers McGraw to life, as well as a rum-soaked savarin, earl grey tea mousse and a milk ice cream paying homage to Sense and Sensibility. But who will be leaving the competition?

programme.title: Artemis: To the Moon and Back
programme.desc: The inside story of the Artemis II mission - filmed over three and a half years at NASA. How did four astronauts travel to the moon, going deeper into space than ever before?

programme.title: Michael Jackson: An American Tragedy
programme.desc: In August 1991, Michael signs the most lucrative deal in music history with Sony Music and prepares for what his team believes will be a landmark year. Then, a 13-year-old boy accuses Michael of child sexual abuse. Detectives describe the shock of investigating the world’s most famous performer, while inside Michael’s camp, aides recall disbelief and a frantic effort to keep Michael’s worldwide tour, business empire and public image intact. As the story breaks, police search Michael’s home, and the media storm intensifies. Michael publicly denies the allegations, condemning what he calls a 'trial by media'.

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: Ian and the team deal with a newly published report from the United Nations health agency which concludes that some key host cities may now be too hot to safely play football in due to global heating. The challenge is how to get ahead of the narrative so that the scheduled matches can still take place. Meanwhile, Will is settling in to life at oversight, and the social media team figure that the only way to get a younger US audience interested in the tournament is to put a vibe under the whole idea of football by getting a major celebrity involved, if they can only find one.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Insights and global interviews on the news stories of the day. With Victoria Derbyshire.

programme.title: Miriam Margolyes Made Me Me
programme.desc: Director Simon Draper sets out to make a podcast with actress Miriam Margolyes, but the project soon becomes sidetracked as Simon is drawn ever deeper into her orbit. The podcast becomes a chaotic, joyful road trip, revealing Miriam’s true legacy isn’t just her work but the lives she’s quietly transformed, beginning with Simon.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. A crime wave sweeps the city as the boys join a Roman military fitness class to protect themselves on the streets, Flavia introduces some dubious new security measures at work, and Grumio starts dating Agatha, a talented baker who may well be a feeder.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a special edition of the iconic game show as Olympic silver medallist Katarina Johnson-Thompson goes up against the infamous Banker - supported on the wings by her friends, family and fellow athletes, can Katarina choose the right boxes and resist the Banker's tempting cash offers until just the right moment in order to take home a fortune for her chosen charity?

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S]

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great Chocolate Showdown
programme.desc: An ooey-gooey, decadent chocolate dessert competition series where 10 home bakers go head-to-head in the indulgent world of chocolate, vying for the grand prize in a range of creative and exciting chocolate-based challenges. In order to survive the competition from episode to episode and avoid elimination, the chocoholic dessert-makers must dazzle a panel of world-renowned chocolatiers and food expert judges with their delicious and inventive creations. In the end, three bakers take on the biggest chocolate challenge of their lives, but only one is crowned Great Chocolate Showdown Champion and wins a 50,000-dollar grand prize.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Food Stars USA
programme.desc: The first episode of the American version of the competitive cookery series where chef Gordon Ramsay brings his expert knowledge and unique leadership style to a search for the next great food and beverage industry entrepreneur. Christopher Tompkins, the founder of Broad Street Oyster Co., guest judges as the competitors are split into teams and tasked with creating a food shack on the beach - the team with the most profitable shack is safe from elimination.

programme.title: Buying the View
programme.desc: House-hunting show that explores luxury listings in majestic mountain ranges, sprawling beaches, and glittering urban skylines. Estate agent Lisa Matlock takes on the challenge of finding Jeff and his buying buddy Cara a Muskoka cottage that comes complete with a boathouse, room for entertaining family and friends, and fantastic lake views.

programme.title: Sam & Billie: Sister Act
programme.desc: Sam and Billie are back in this series that reunites the sisters as they enter the next chapter of their lives - in this episode, Sam has an ambitious work project but a crisis with the manufacturing threatens to ruin everything, and Billie finally gets a diagnosis from the doctors on her ongoing health struggles which means a lifestyle overhaul. Elsewhere, dad Dave celebrates his birthday but reveals that his struggles with sobriety are more than the sisters realised, and Sue has a dramatic makeover in a bid to regain her confidence - in a bid to destress and reconnect, the sisters take their mum and dad off grid. As the sisters reminisce about their childhood, they reveal the full impact of their dad going to prison.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Reality series. As Pete's new relationship with Shelby goes from strength to strength, his friends are concerned that he's isolating himself from the rest of the group. Chloe Sims also has reservations over his new lady love, whilst Gatsby insinuates that Shelby is flirtatious with other guys. As the chorus of disapproval grows louder, will Pete acknowledge that his relationship is too full-on? Or is Shelby worth protecting at all costs?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: Kenya Vs Ken: Cynthia and Mike's relationship is tested. The girls kick out their frustrations with a game of kickball. Marc invites Kenya's nemesis to a bowling game. [S] S12 Ep15

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programme.desc: Housewarming History Lesson: US reality series. The divide between Teresa, Joe and Melissa is at a standstill as Frankie hits Dolores with some hard questions. [S] S13 Ep4

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show where three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles as they compete in the ultimate supermarket challenge to win a 3,000-pound prize - along with the classic Supermarket Sweep quizzes, trolley dashes and pastel jumpers, the revamped show features exciting new games, challenges and some famous faces.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: The re-united camp face some extreme challenges. Two campmates face their ultimate fears as they are literally dropped from a great height. [S] S2 Ep5

programme.title: Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern presents a celebrity edition of the popular game show as former Pussycat Doll Ashley Roberts, comedian Tim Vine, and TV presenter Mel Giedroyc line up to say what they see, compete to identify some well-known phrases, and win thousands of pounds for their chosen charities.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Now that Gemma and Arg are finally official, it appears that they might not be on the same page after all. Lockie and Yaz both vow to write honest letters to one other to heal their divisions. Dean takes Amber on a second date to a cocktail-making class. Jon pursues drama of the thespian kind.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: In the Name of Charity: Cynthia hosts a baby shower for Eva. Kenya helps her husband plan a charity event. Kandi does whatever it takes to win the role of a lifetime. [S] S12 Ep16

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programme.desc: Driving Miss Crazy: US reality series. Danielle throws Valentina an over-the-top Barbie-themed birthday party, and Teresa and her daughters go wedding veil shopping. [S] S13 Ep5

programme.title: New: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Larry Lamb, Sam Quek and Scarlett Moffatt all trying to guess familiar phrases in animated clues - if they can 'say what they see', they could get the chance to win a 50,000-pound jackpot for their chosen charity.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: The re-united camp face some extreme challenges. Two campmates face their ultimate fears as they are literally dropped from a great height. [S] S2 Ep5

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts and are all about logic and common sense. This is the quiz that the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show and try to make it to the end to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right and win up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: TikTok: Murder Gone Viral
programme.desc: Documentary series exploring extraordinary true crime cases linked to the world's fastest-growing social media platform. In a case that has drawn millions of views on TikTok, 17-year-old Charlie Cosser was fatally stabbed by 16-year-old Yura Varybrus at an end-of-term summer party for teenagers - Charlie didn't know Yura but had asked him to leave after a girl said that he had been bothering her. As Charlie lay dying, his dad Martin made him a promise that he would campaign for justice and raise awareness of knife crime - Martin's agonised, angry and tender videos tell the story of a family struggling to come to terms with an act of senseless violence that tore their lives apart.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. While at the Halloween Carnival with his family and friends, Peter stumbles across the owner of a hologram-themed attraction who shows off a device that can create interactive holograms - after bribing the inventor, Peter decides to make a hologram based on the best version of himself to get out of menial tasks. While Peter enjoys its usefulness at first, he grows jealous after seeing his hologram kiss Lois...

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Stewie is introduced to hide-and-seek during a fundraiser at his daycare and becomes addicted to it, but when he attempts to play it with Brian once too often, he hides in Quagmire's suitcase and is accidentally taken to Paris in France. Meanwhile, Peter and Lois successfully bid on tickets to Vermont at the fundraiser and set out to break Bonnie's Instagram like record by taking a scenic photo.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Jealous after seeing the Tubbs-Brown family enjoying each other's company, Lois tries to get her family to spend the day together, but all her attempts fail. Peter suggests watching a film - shooting down ideas to watch one from the usual commercial giants, Peter says they should rent one from Blockbuster together. With the local branch closed, he decides to visit the last one in existence with his family in tow.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Crystal Mess: Animated comedy. When Mr Frond lends Tina a crystal which his girlfriend claims has special powers, it seems to work and she soon becomes a human good luck charm. [S,AD] S12 Ep2

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. When Gayle asks Linda to help her shoot an audition tape for a reality TV show featuring gruelling physical tasks, Linda is sceptical and sets out to shoot a mundane video that will leave Gayle safe from mockery when she is inevitably rejected - meanwhile, Bob purchases an automated meat grinder but decides to return it when he feels that its outcomes don't have the same taste as his hand-ground products.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. Marcus, Stylax and Ramases - the work experience boy who also happens to be the son of the company owner - invent a new office-based sport called Jugball, and Grumio samples some gourmet food when Ramases lends him his store card for an emporium.

programme.title: Deep Fake Neighbour Wars
programme.desc: Impressions show that uses deep fake technology to turn the UK's best new impressionists into the world's most famous celebrities. Andy Murray and his mum Lorraine Kelly clash with RuPaul over noisy chickens, and Will Smith must intervene when Olivia Colman and Jay-Z's pet is catnapped by Tom Hiddleston.

Elsewhere, the sisters jet off on a family trip to Turkey with all six kids and mum Sue - while away, Sam opens up about her involvement with a charity who were stolen from and decides to set the record straight to her followers, and Billie reveals that she is considering another move after years building her dream home.

This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts and are all about logic and common sense. This is the quiz that the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show and try to make it to the end to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right and win up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: TikTok: Murder Gone Viral
programme.desc: Documentary series exploring extraordinary true crime cases linked to the world's fastest-growing social media platform. 13-year-old Tristyn Bailey was an All-American cheerleader who was savagely murdered by 14-year-old Aiden Fucci, a boy she knew from school, in a case that attracted millions of views and heated debate on TikTok - social media went into a frenzy when her mother reported Tristyn missing on Mother's Day morning in May 2021. It was unusual for teenagers to go missing in the middle-class neighbourhood of St John's County, and the terrible revelation that Tristyn had suffered 114 stab wounds in a frenzied attack resulted in millions petitioning for the teenage killer to be tried as an adult so he could be given a life sentence. This episode features unique footage from Tristyn's family and friends who are still grieving for the senseless loss of a kind and beautiful young girl.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Stewie becomes a fan of a young pop star who used to be on his favourite TV show - while at her concert, he posts a viral live tweet that she construes as an insult, resulting in her fanbase harassing him for days on end to the point of getting Rupert killed. Meanwhile, Peter finds himself easily fatigued due to his weight, but a surgery suggested by Dr Hartman ends up leaving him with lots of excess skin.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. When Peter and Chris discover that they don't know much about each other during a 'Generation Gap' game at the Quahog Fall Festival, Lois orders them to hang out more, but this backfires when they quickly bond over making fun of her habits and eventually gain control of the household by outvoting her. Meanwhile, Brian falls for a carny named Amber and assumes that the relationship will be brief and sex-packed.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: A dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town strive to cope with everyday life as they are thrown from one crazy scenario to another.

programme.title: Code of Silence (Signed Version)
programme.desc: Suspenseful crime drama. Alison's life as a police informant becomes precarious when she is invited onto a lavish trip to a luxurious hotel with Liam - Liam insists on adopting false identities and Alison soon discovers that he is using her as cover to spy on Amir Joshi and his family. Alison is convinced that she can walk the fine line between her duty to the police and their undeniable connection - it's when Liam opens up about his troubled past as a foster child and the pressures driving his involvement in the robbery that Alison wavers. She's falling in love with him and can't resist it any longer when they get back to their room - when she gets back, Alison lies to the detectives about sleeping with Liam. When it is revealed that Liam is listening in having hacked Alison's hearing aids, Liam doesn't confront Alison about her betrayal - and instead shows her the necklace he plans to steal as he proposes that they flee with his ill-gotten wealth to build a future after the heist.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Sitcom about a bus driver and his conductor pal. Stan is having difficulty supporting the whole family on his meagre earnings.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jonny is shocked when Katie tells him of her plot to cut Gray out of the baby's life. Pollard has a visit from a health and safety officer, and Louise attempts to apologise to Viv.

programme.title: Never the Twain
programme.desc: Classic British sitcom. When burglars go to work in the neighbourhood, this leads to an eventful night for Oliver, Simon, Mrs Sadler and Banks when they are held at gunpoint and some interesting characteristics come to light in the process...

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: There is a celebration at Luxton and District because it is 50 years since they got their first motor bus. Blakey organises an exhibition to re-create the "good old days" before the Unions got hold of the busmen and made his life impossible.

programme.desc: Viv faces a tense standoff with the police as Freddie grabs the twins' pram, she attempts to get help from Ross, but he finds the planted cash, resulting in her being taken to the police station. Nicola gets frustrated with the slow progress of selling Rodney's book.

programme.desc: Rosie catches Liam sharing a kiss with Carla and films them on her mobile phone. Maria has a change of heart about her separation and Julie drives Fiz to breaking point.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Detective drama. When Lewis and Hathaway are called in to investigate the murder of a rising star on the Oxford theatrical circuit, they focus their suspicions on the cast of his current play - as Lewis discovers all the theatrical ambitions and jealousies and wonders if an actor would kill for a good part, Hathaway thinks he may have uncovered just who killed Lewis's wife in a hit and run accident years before.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. An American motorcyclist called Charlie turns up in Aidensfield and causes quite a stir when Kate has to fix him up after an accident, Gina falls for him, and a local Korean War veteran decides to pick a fight with him! As things get slightly out of hand, Gina has to decide whether to accept Charlie's offer of a move to London or not - meanwhile, Greengrass acquires a couple of classic English motorbikes claiming that they are for a regimental museum... but in fact he plans to sell them on to Charlie!

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series set in 1960s Yorkshire about a policeman. Inspector Crossley from Whitby arrives at the police house to see Nick but is angry to find the police house being used as a doctor's surgery by Kate - meanwhile, a new job offer could be a fresh start for Kate, but Nick is reluctant for her to accept. As a coach trip to Whitby organised by Gina becomes a welcome day out for the locals and Kate and Nick are dragged into a desperate situation when a little girl loses her father on the beach, Greengrass is in trouble again... and this time it's for years of tax evasion.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When council clerk Martin Barrett is shot dead, Barnaby and Jones discover that he was an expert blackmailer. They investigate which of his victims hated him enough to kill him, and the trail leads to Fennacombe Bay. Why are Richard and Maggie Florian spending so much time at sea - and could police committee chairman Sir John Waverley have a scandalous past? With the help of a former policeman turned fisherman, Barnaby takes to the waves to find out.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jo wakes up bruised and Andy blames it on her drunken state the night before. Viv tells Bob she kissed Freddie, and Terry regrets letting the factory move its operations.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Nicola claims full credit for Rodney's book when she receives a call from a publisher. Bob opens up to Diane, and Terry decides he can't cope with the factory workers any more.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: A weary Liam begins to yield under Maria's persuasive charms and reconsiders their relationship. David is surprised when Gail visits with Ted in tow and Carla buys Rosie's silence.

programme.desc: Omnibus. Sally plans the decor for her new home while Claire has second thoughts about the deal. Harry is visited by his ex-wife Clarissa and Michelle returns from Ireland.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama. Greengrass is ordered to have Alfred destroyed, but Nick suspects that another party may be to blame and has to prove his theory before Alfred pays for the crime.

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Heartbeat

Meanwhile, Blaketon takes over Nick's patch back in Aidensfield while he's away - it gives him a great opportunity to keep an eye on Greengrass, but he fails to find out that he's doing a very good trade in venison...

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. June 1813 - the South Essex is seriously short of men, and when the Duke of Wellington is told that there are no recruits available, he sends Sharpe to England to investigate. When Sharpe and Harper arrive, they are informed that there are 700 men waiting for them in Chelmsford - however, Sharpe finds the barracks deserted with no sign of his missing regiment. He and Harper decide to assume other identities and enlist - recruited by Sergeant Havercamp, Sharpe and Harper arrive at a training camp near the estate of Sir Henry Simmerson where they are trained mercilessly. Sharpe discovers that the new recruits are being auctioned to other regiments and returns to the Horse Guards with this information to entrust it to an old friend called Lawford... but Lawford wants to avoid a scandal and promptly tells Lord Fenner, who tries to have Sharpe killed. With the help of Fenner's mistress Lady Anne, Sharpe must now find the proof to implicate Fenner.

programme.title: Prem Granth
programme.desc: A lawyer named Somen, loving Kajri across caste lines, confronts his father's hypocrisy. After trials, he must choose between Kajri and an arranged marriage.

programme.title: Avtaar
programme.desc: In a heartwarming twist, a man and his wife flourish against the odds, proving that their bond is stronger than the abandonment of their ungrateful sons. Success awaits them!

programme.title: Apaharan
programme.desc: Ajay, driven by his dream to join the police, borrows money but fails to repay. Cornered by debt, he makes a dangerous choice-getting involved in a kidnapping plot.

programme.title: Krantiveer
programme.desc: Disowned and aimless, a man lands in a corrupt village ruled by crime lords and politicians. A hopeful journalist inspires him to change.

programme.title: Dadagiri
programme.desc: Singh offers to marry Deepa and for her dad's sake, Deepa agrees, and a heartbroken Dharma decides to remain single.

programme.title: Mr. Bond
programme.desc: Mr Bond Is A Detective Known For Solving The Toughest Of Crime Mysteries. But The Arrival Of Dragon, A Gangster Involved In Child-Trafficking, Seems To Be A Real Challenge For The Crime-Solver.

programme.title: Ghajini
programme.desc: A carefree young man's antics lead to hilarious confusion as he juggles love, lies and unexpected twists in a rib-tickling comedy.

programme.title: Anari No 1
programme.desc: A devoted son navigates family pride, love and sacrifice, striving to uphold his father's honor while following his heart.

programme.title: Silsila Hai Pyar Ka
programme.desc: Vanshika lands a job caring for a wealthy man's son, and through her patience and kindness, she helps him transform from a spoiled brat into a more considerate young man.

programme.title: Kishen Kanhaiya
programme.desc: One mansion-raised, one street-smart-Kishen and Kanhaiya reunite after years apart. The twist? They're twins! And now, it's double trouble for the villains trying to tear their world apart.

programme.title: Ram Lakhan
programme.desc: Two brothers split because of differing beliefs, yet fate brings them back together as they eventually rescue and support each other through unfolding events.

programme.title: Janta Ki Adalat
programme.desc: DSP Jyoti arrests Shankar after he threatens a minister. She learns about the minister's crimes and decides to thwart his plans of becoming a CM.

programme.title: Nadiya Ke Paar
programme.desc: Chandan loves Gunja, but after her sister's tragic death, tradition demands she marry his brother. Torn between love and duty, Gunja faces a heartbreaking choice that could change everything.

programme.title: Muqaddar Ka Badshah
programme.desc: Naresh,works hard to earn money so that his sister can marry the man she loves. The marriage does not take place.

programme.title: Lakshya
programme.desc: Karan, a free spirit, makes a snap decision to join the army. As he navigates the tough challenges ahead, he strives to prove his worth and find his place.

programme.title: Dastak
programme.desc: Sharad, mentally unstable, obsessively pursues Miss Universe Sushmita, resorting to harm to those close to her.

programme.title: Baazigar
programme.desc: A scheming killer plans to destroy a businessman's family, starting with the brutal murder of his eldest daughter. This chilling thriller unfolds as the businessman fights to protect his loved ones.

programme.title: Aarzoo
programme.desc: Pooja marries Amar after Vijay's death. But when Vijay returns, her world spins again, torn between loyalty, love, and the life she's already begun to rebuild.

programme.title: Mere Sajna Saath Nibhana
programme.desc: He loves her deeply, but she's bound by a wealthy landlord's control. Their romance struggles against class divides, secrets, and the cruel grip of power.

programme.title: Andha Kanoon
programme.desc: Vijay's parents are murdered. He partners with a framed forest officer, and the two begin a dangerous journey to take down Amar, Akbar, and Anthony, driven by pain and purpose.

programme.title: Gopi Kishan
programme.desc: Kishan, a criminal, impersonates policeman Gopi to find his father. His actions unexpectedly improve Gopi's life, leading to a twist of fate and identity.

programme.title: Military Raaj
programme.desc: A patriotic military officer decides to fight the criminal elements destroying the country.

programme.title: Eena Meena Deeka
programme.desc: Deeka, newly released from prison, unexpectedly finds herself in the middle of a bank heist led by the clever Eena. Get ready for a wild ride of twists!

programme.title: Khiladi
programme.desc: Raj, Neelam, and Boney fake Sheetal's kidnapping as a prank, but things go horribly wrong when she is actually murdered. Now, all clues point to them as the prime suspects in the crime.

programme.title: Sanam
programme.desc: Gaurav, unloved by his family, joins the army after Narendra's death. He hopes to honor his brother's memory and finally win the respect of his distant father.

programme.title: Hamara Dil Aapke Paas Hai
programme.desc: Preeti courageously shares her story in court but faces backlash when the perpetrator strikes again. Now, she's not only battling her trauma but also dealing with her family's rejection.

programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Johny Lever. A small-time contractor faces relentless corruption, political pressure, & personal humiliation while trying to complete honest road projects. His fight exposes the absurdities of a system

programme.title: Vivah
programme.desc: Starring: Shahid Kapoor,Amrita Rao. Poonam, a traditional girl gets engaged to Prem. Their faith and love are tested when an accident occurs and Poonam might be scarred for life.

programme.title: Zee Cine Awards 2026-Main Event
programme.desc: Zee Cine Awards 2026-Main Event

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Starring: Jeet,Biswajit Chakraborty. Raja is hired to shoot a party leader but is instructed not to kill him. When the politician ends up getting killed by an unknown assassin, Raja becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Tehran
programme.desc: Starring: John Abraham,Manushi Chhillar. A thrilling drama inspired by actual events and focusing on the conflict between Russia and Ukraine.

programme.title: Tees Maar Khan
programme.desc: Starring: Aadi Saikumar,Payal Rajput. Having escaped from abusive households, Tees Maar Khan and Vasudha form a familial bond. Years later, a tragedy involving the mafia leaves Tees Maar Khan vying for revenge.

programme.title: Valimai
programme.desc: Starring: Ajith Kumar,Karthikeya. A notorious biker gang pushes the city into lawlessness. Arjun, a brave cop, takes charge, determined to dismantle the gang and restore peace before everything collapses.

programme.title: Bro
programme.desc: Starring: Pawan Kalyan,Sai Dharam Tej. Given three months to fix his life, a self-centered man is guided by Time itself. Through laughs and challenges, he learns family, love, and redemption before fate calls again.

programme.title: K3 - Kaali Ka Karishma
programme.desc: Starring: Raghava Lawrence,Oviya. Raghava, a young man fearful of ghosts, enjoys a happy life with his family until a trip to Coimbatore results in his possession by a vengeful spirit.

programme.title: Jaat
programme.desc: Starring: Sunny Deol,Randeep Hooda and Regina Cassandra. A stranger's clash with Varadaraja Ranatunga's men in a coastal village exposes the locals' misery and begins a battle for justice.

programme.title: Sikandar
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Rashmika Mandanna. A tragic accident pushes the powerful Sikandar to protect the less fortunate by standing up to corruption and greed - using any means necessary.

programme.title: Kalki 2898 AD
programme.desc: Starring: Amitabh Bachchan,Kamal Haasan. A woman pregnant with Lord Vishnu's avatar must be protected. A daring group battles god-king Yaskin in a wild, apocalyptic journey filled with action, faith, and fierce determination.

programme.title: Rathnam
programme.desc: Starring: Vishal,Priya Bhavani. Rathnam a young man near the Tamil Nadu Andhra Pradesh border and defends Janani from gangsters.

programme.title: Antony
programme.desc: Starring: Joju George,Chemban Vinod Jose. Antony, once feared as a ruthless gangster, unexpectedly becomes the guardian of Ann Maria. Their bond grows, but a dangerous enemy from his past resurfaces with deadly intent.

programme.title: Samara
programme.desc: Starring: Rahman,Bharath Srinivasan. A police officer, going on a mission to a snowy region, soon finds himself investigating a series of deaths.

programme.title: Shiva The Super Hero 2
programme.desc: Starring: Nagarjuna,Anushka Shetty. During his childhood, Mallikarjuna faces a great tragedy as his parents and grandparents are killed by a huge feline. This incident leaves his younger sister paralyzed, which made Malli an atheist.

programme.title: Mirugaa
programme.desc: Starring: Srikanth,Raai Laxmi. A killer stalks a wealthy woman in the woods. Just then, chaos erupts-a tiger hunt begins, and suddenly, survival isn't so one-sided anymore.

programme.title: Mission Raniganj
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Parineeti Chopra. Mining engineer Jaswant Singh Gill leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.

programme.title: Koi Mil Gaya
programme.desc: Starring: Hrithik Roshan,Priety Zinta. Rohit, a specially-abled boy, befriends an alien. Police pursue the extraterrestrial, testing Rohit's resolve to protect his newfound friend.

programme.title: Bengal Tiger
programme.desc: Starring: Ravi Teja,Tamannaah Bhatia. Simple man Akash loves politician Gajapathi's daughter, Meera. When Gajapathi discovers Akash's father's identity, suspicions arise about past vendettas.

programme.title: Bhaje Vaayu Vegam
programme.desc: Starring: Tanikella Bharani,Krishna Chaitanya. A budding cricketer bets big to fund his father's surgery but is betrayed by a bookie. Seeking revenge, he lands on a crime website, facing unexpected dangers that test his resolve.

programme.title: Kaatera
programme.desc: Starring: Darshan Thoogudeepa,Jagapathi Babu. Kaatera, a blacksmith from Bheemanahalli, risks his life to confront feudal landlords and ensure a reform act that gives farmers long-awaited freedom, justice, hope, and change.

programme.title: Sirivennela
programme.desc: Starring: Balagam Sanjay Krishna,Prabhakar. A paranormal expert meets a child's vengeful ghost, uncovering a heartbreaking story. The haunting grows darker as she searches for answers and a way to calm the spirit.

programme.title: Vaishnavi
programme.desc: Starring: Anushka Shetty,Samrat. Vaishnavi's death leaves her daughter heartbroken. Rajesh, her husband, is stunned to find a woman who resembles Vaishnavi, raising questions that blur the line between fate and reality.

programme.title: The Real Tiger
programme.desc: Starring: Mahesh Babu,Samantha Ruth Prabhu. After years, politician Shankar wakes up from a coma. His son, a cop, recreates everything as would be expected by his father in order to save him from any shock. He also hunts for his father's foes.

programme.title: Rogue
programme.desc: Starring: Ishan,Mannara Chopra. A young man, shuffling between two jobs, falls for the commissioner's sister, Anjali, who betrays him. After finishing his time behind bars, he meets another girl named, Anjali, which he despises.

programme.title: Vanvaas
programme.desc: Starring: Nana Patekar,Utkarsh Sharma. Left behind by his sons, a dementia-stricken father begins a journey with an unlikely companion-a clever thief determined to help him reunite with his long-forgotten family.
